title: Closure census does not reconcile with source-of-truth backlog and falsely claims all downgrades were triaged

findingDetails.evidence: Census says 'Downgraded to P2 and triaged there | 63 (of which fixed/waived per P2 rules)'. The cited backlog actually has 57 downgraded entries (downgraded_p2=10 + downgraded_p2_v2=47, confirmed by grep+uniq), and only 49 of those 57 carry a p2_decision. The P1 census column sums to 51+24+63=138 against the stated 132 total; correct downgraded count 57 makes 51+24+57=132.
findingDetails.why: In a verification-and-remediation packet whose deliverable is an honest finding ledger, the headline closure summary miscounts the downgrade bucket by 6, fails to sum to its own total, and asserts fixed/waived triage for 8 entries that were never triaged — misleading any operator/reviewer auditing closure completeness.
findingDetails.recommendation: Correct the downgraded count to 57, fix the P1 column to sum to 132, and either triage the 8 untriaged downgrades with a p2_decision or soften the 'of which fixed/waived per P2 rules' claim to reflect that downgraded-but-deferred entries exist.

title: Downgraded P1 finding closed with zero verification or disposition rationale (closest to silently-closed)

findingDetails.evidence: Entry 'Comparison helper ignores the configured NDCG cutoff' (lines 1700-1715) carries disposition 'downgraded_p2' with no v2_proof and no p2_decision/p2_reason — unlike the other 56 downgrades. 7 of the 8 untriaged downgrades (240,275,684,1433,1452,1786,1803) at least record a v2_proof rationale; this one records nothing. The underlying code defect was independently resolved (bm25-baseline.ts:224,267 now thread configurable k into computeNDCG), but the registry gives no indication of verification or fix.
findingDetails.why: A tracked P1 finding was de-prioritized out of the P1 fix/refute accounting with no recorded verification, fix, or waive rationale — the registry alone cannot tell whether it was resolved, deferred, or abandoned, violating the 'honest open status' / 'disposition is source of truth, nothing fixed unverified' contract (remediation-plan.md:14).
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a v2_proof (citing bm25-baseline.ts:267 as resolved) and a p2_decision/p2_reason to entry idx for the NDCG-cutoff finding, and audit the other 7 untriaged downgrades for the same closure-rationale gap.
